### compose-args: -f compose.yaml -f compose.discovery.yaml
### file: .env
# Generated by `songstress install` — secrets live HERE and only here
# (mode 0600). songstress.lock.json carries no secrets.

# ── basics ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TZ=UTC
PUID=1000
PGID=1000
MUSIC_DIR=/srv/music
SONGSTRESS_PORT=8090
ENABLE_TELEMETRY=true

# ── app admin (sign-in for web, desktop & mobile) ────────────────────────────
SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL=a@b.c
SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD=sct.admin.7f3k

# ── Navidrome (managed sibling service) ──────────────────────────────────────
NAVIDROME_PORT=4533
NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=sct.nd.7f3k

# ── Discovery (AudioMuse-AI side-car) ────────────────────────────────────────
AUDIOMUSE_API_TOKEN=sct.amtok.7f3k
AUDIOMUSE_PASSWORD=sct.ampw.7f3k
AUDIOMUSE_DB_PASSWORD=sct.amdb.7f3k

### file: compose.discovery.yaml
# Generated by `songstress install` — Discovery (AudioMuse-AI) overlay.
# AudioMuse is AGPL-3.0 and runs unmodified from upstream images
# (https://github.com/NeptuneHub/AudioMuse-AI). Internal-only: Songstress is
# the management surface.
services:
  songstress:
    depends_on:
      audiomuse:
        condition: service_started

  audiomuse:
    image: ghcr.io/neptunehub/audiomuse-ai:2.6.1-noavx2
    container_name: songstress-audiomuse
    environment:
      - SERVICE_TYPE=flask
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - POSTGRES_USER=audiomuse
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${AUDIOMUSE_DB_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=audiomusedb
      - POSTGRES_HOST=audiomuse-postgres
      - POSTGRES_PORT=5432
      - REDIS_URL=redis://audiomuse-redis:6379/0
      # Headless config (live-verified): MEDIASERVER_TYPE is REQUIRED or all
      # NAVIDROME_* is silently ignored; AUDIOMUSE_USER/PASSWORD create its
      # admin — without one every API call 403s with "Setup required".
      - MEDIASERVER_TYPE=navidrome
      - NAVIDROME_URL=http://navidrome:4533
      - NAVIDROME_USER=admin
      - NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
      - AUTH_ENABLED=true
      - AUDIOMUSE_USER=admin
      - AUDIOMUSE_PASSWORD=${AUDIOMUSE_PASSWORD}
      - API_TOKEN=${AUDIOMUSE_API_TOKEN}
    depends_on:
      - audiomuse-postgres
      - audiomuse-redis
    restart: unless-stopped

  audiomuse-worker:
    image: ghcr.io/neptunehub/audiomuse-ai:2.6.1-noavx2
    container_name: songstress-audiomuse-worker
    environment:
      - SERVICE_TYPE=worker
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - POSTGRES_USER=audiomuse
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${AUDIOMUSE_DB_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=audiomusedb
      - POSTGRES_HOST=audiomuse-postgres
      - POSTGRES_PORT=5432
      - REDIS_URL=redis://audiomuse-redis:6379/0
      - MEDIASERVER_TYPE=navidrome
      - NAVIDROME_URL=http://navidrome:4533
      - NAVIDROME_USER=admin
      - NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
      - AUDIOMUSE_USER=admin
      - AUDIOMUSE_PASSWORD=${AUDIOMUSE_PASSWORD}
      - API_TOKEN=${AUDIOMUSE_API_TOKEN}
    depends_on:
      - audiomuse-postgres
      - audiomuse-redis
    restart: unless-stopped

  audiomuse-postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    container_name: songstress-audiomuse-postgres
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - POSTGRES_USER=audiomuse
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${AUDIOMUSE_DB_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=audiomusedb
    volumes:
      - audiomuse-pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped

  audiomuse-redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: songstress-audiomuse-redis
    volumes:
      - audiomuse-redisdata:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  audiomuse-pgdata:
  audiomuse-redisdata:

### file: compose.yaml
# Generated by `songstress install` — regenerate with `songstress reconfigure`.
# Songstress (datastore, dashboard, acquisition worker) + official Navidrome.
services:
  songstress:
    image: ghcr.io/pacholoamit/songstress:v0.21.0
    container_name: songstress
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - PUID=${PUID}
      - PGID=${PGID}
      - SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL=${SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_EMAIL}
      - SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${SONGSTRESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD}
      - ENABLE_TELEMETRY=${ENABLE_TELEMETRY}
      - APP_VERSION=0.21.0
      - MUSIC_LIBRARIES=Main=/music
      # Managed Navidrome: Songstress provisions + drives the service below;
      # the player streams straight from it on ${NAVIDROME_PORT}.
      - SONGSTRESS_MANAGED_NAVIDROME=1
      - SONGSTRESS_NAVIDROME_PORT=${NAVIDROME_PORT}
      - NAVIDROME_URL=http://navidrome:4533
      - NAVIDROME_USERNAME=admin
      - NAVIDROME_PASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
      # Email (optional; empty host/to = disabled). Set via `.env` — the install
      # wizard's SMTP group writes them; these defaults cover the unset case.
      - SMTP_HOST=${SMTP_HOST:-}
      - SMTP_PORT=${SMTP_PORT:-587}
      - SMTP_USERNAME=${SMTP_USERNAME:-}
      - SMTP_PASSWORD=${SMTP_PASSWORD:-}
      - SMTP_FROM=${SMTP_FROM:-}
      - SMTP_TO=${SMTP_TO:-}
      - SMTP_STARTTLS=${SMTP_STARTTLS:-true}
      # Discovery side-car (see compose.discovery.yaml).
      - AUDIOMUSE_URL=http://audiomuse:8000
      - AUDIOMUSE_API_TOKEN=${AUDIOMUSE_API_TOKEN}
    ports:
      - "${SONGSTRESS_PORT}:8090"
    volumes:
      - ./data:/pb/pb_data
      - ${MUSIC_DIR}:/music
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp:mode=1777
    depends_on:
      navidrome:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped

  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:0.62.0
    container_name: songstress-navidrome
    user: "${PUID}:${PGID}"
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ}
      - ND_MUSICFOLDER=/music
      - ND_DATAFOLDER=/data
      - ND_PORT=4533
      # Songstress triggers scans after acquisitions — no double-scanning.
      - ND_SCANNER_SCHEDULE=0
      - ND_SCANNER_WATCHERWAIT=0
      - ND_SCANNER_SCANONSTARTUP=true
      - ND_ENABLETRANSCODINGCONFIG=true
      # Creates the 'admin' user on Navidrome's FIRST boot only.
      - ND_DEVAUTOCREATEADMINPASSWORD=${NAVIDROME_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      # Published so the browser can stream/seek directly.
      - "${NAVIDROME_PORT}:4533"
    volumes:
      # ND data nested under the datastore root — one directory to back up.
      - ./data/navidrome:/data
      - ${MUSIC_DIR}:/music:ro
    healthcheck:
      # The official image ships no HEALTHCHECK; songstress gates on this.
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://127.0.0.1:4533/ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
